task: M8 fabricated live data (fake scores + fake 'BBC/365Scores agree' citations). Add a live web-search waterfall + fix the routing so live queries actually search.
live_verified: Muhammad confirmed working on his phone 2026-06-23
root_cause: 3-part: (1) ROUTING — bare 'score' with no vs/match fell to NONE and answered from training; (2) one provider — only Tavily wired, SERPER_API_KEY unused; (3) the empty-search honesty guard already existed (orchestrator ~3062) but never fired because the query never reached search.
files_changed: lib/tools/serperSearch.js (NEW) — Serper/Google wrapper; normalizeSerper() maps answerBox/sports_results/knowledgeGraph + organic -> {results:[{title,url,content}], answer}; 7s timeout; X-API-KEY header
lib/search.js — waterfall Serper(2500/mo free) -> Tavily(1000/mo free) -> empty; each env-gated, fails safe; ~3500 free/mo
lib/intentClassifier.js — bare score/scored/who-won/final-score/half-time + Arabic (natija/man-faza/score) route to LIVE_DATA
tests: B118 32/32; regressions intent-routing 26/26, under-routing 39/39, fleet-routing 19/19; serperSearch.js + search.js brace/paren balanced; Vercel build = JS syntax proof (node absent).
free_stack: Stayed 100% free (his rule). Gemini built-in grounding left as a future PAID tier-3 opt-in, OFF by default.
rollback: Vercel 1-click to 08a83ff, OR unset SERPER_API_KEY (waterfall degrades to Tavily-only = pre-118 behavior).
tradeoff: 'score' now always searches (even 'credit score') — benign; LIVE_DATA grounds, never fabricates.
lesson: Before building 'add web search', traced the existing path and found Tavily + an anti-fabrication guard already shipped — the real fix was ROUTING, not new infra.
